def build_processor(dataset_path):
    with open(dataset_path, "rb") as f:
        huge_dataset = f.read()

    records = parse_records(huge_dataset)

    def process(item):
        return lookup(item, records)

    return process


def create_validator(schema_path):
    with open(schema_path) as f:
        schema_data = f.read()

    compiled_schema = compile_schema(schema_data)
    all_references = extract_references(compiled_schema)

    def validate(payload):
        return check(payload, compiled_schema, all_references)

    return validate


def make_filter_fn(config_path):
    with open(config_path) as f:
        raw_config = f.read()

    parsed = parse_config(raw_config)
    full_index = build_index(parsed)

    def filter_fn(item):
        return match(item, full_index)

    return filter_fn
